pyrxd
v0.9.0 · PyPI
open-source Python SDK
for the Radiant blockchain

Build on Radiant — in Python.

Wallets, tokens, SPV — and trustless cross-chain atomic swaps across 7 chains, no bridge, no custodian.
💼
Wallets & Transactions
HD wallets, tx building, ElectrumX, SPV proofs
🪙
Glyph Tokens
NFT · FT · dMint — mint, transfer, deploy from code
🛡️
Soulbound & Covenants
consensus-enforced covenants, credential gating
✅ MAINNET-PROVEN dMint V2 — PoW distributed mint, all 5 difficulty modes (FIXED · ASERT · LWMA · EPOCH · SCHEDULE), byte-matched to canonical Photonic.
🌉 CROSS-CHAIN
RXD↔ ₿ BitcoinŁ Litecoin◇ Ethereum🔵 Base🔴 Optimism🔷 Arbitrum▪ Linea
pip install pyrxd
Open source · Apache 2.0 — provided as-is, no warranty
Cross-chain swaps are unaudited — verify before moving real value
